name: ecommerce-conversion-psychology
description: CRO toolkit for ecommerce pages using research-backed psychology

plugins.name: cro
plugins.description: CRO toolkit for ecommerce pages. 6 skills, 11 workflows, 28 reference files (300+ classified findings), 16 templates, ethics-gated visual reports. Commands: /cro:audit, /cro:build, /cro:quick-scan, /cro:compare, /cro:resume. Platform-aware (Shopify, Next.js, OpenCart).
